info.name: SweatPals Public API
info.description:
How to generate an API key

1. Login to your web account on SweatPals.

2. Tap on the "Integrations section" on your left panel

3. Choose "Zapier" and "Add API Key"

4. Tap on "Create New API Key" button

5. The system will create a unique and safe API key for your community

6. Tap to copy it

Help center

https://help.sweatpals.com/

request.description:
GET /api/zapier-provider/new-tickets

This endpoint retrieves a list of new (most recent) created tickets with a specified page size and page number.

Request

  • Method: GET

  • URL: {{host}}/api/zapier-provider/new-tickets

  • Query Parameters:

    • pageSize (integer, required): The number of tickets to be included in a single page.

    • page (integer, required): The page number to retrieve.

request.description:
GET /api/zapier-provider/new-members

This endpoint retrieves a list of new (most recent) members with a specified page size and page number.

Request

  • Method: GET

  • URL: {{host}}/api/zapier-provider/new-members

  • Query Parameters:

    • pageSize (integer, required): The number of members to be included in a single page.

    • page (integer, required): The page number to retrieve.

GET /api/zapier-provider/cancelled-members

This endpoint retrieves a list of cancelled (most recent) members with a specified page size and page number.

Request

  • Method: GET

  • URL: {{host}}/api/zapier-provider/cancelled-members

  • Query Parameters:

    • pageSize (integer, required): The number of members to be included in a single page.

    • page (integer, required): The page number to retrieve.

GET /api/zapier-provider/waitlisted-users

This endpoint retrieves a list of waitlisted (most recent) users with a specified page size and page number.

Request

  • Method: GET

  • URL: {{host}}/api/zapier-provider/waitlisted-users

  • Query Parameters:

    • pageSize (integer, required): The number of users to be included in a single page.

    • page (integer, required): The page number to retrieve.

request.description:
GET /api/zapier-provider/renewed-members

Returns recently renewed memberships for the host resolved from the API key.

Request

  • Method: GET

  • URL: {{host}}/api/zapier-provider/renewed-members

  • Query parameters:

    • pageSize (integer, required): Number of records per page.

    • page (integer, required): 1-based page number to retrieve.

Response fields

  • id (uuid): ID of the new (active) renewal record.

  • membership_id (uuid): Membership entity id.

  • membership_name (string): Human-readable membership name.

  • membershipTier_amount (integer): Tier price in the smallest currency unit (e.g. cents for USD, yen for JPY).

  • user_id (uuid): Member's Sweatpals user id.

  • user_phone (string | null): Member's phone number.

  • user_email (string | null): Member's email.

  • user_fullName (string | null): Member's display name.

  • renewedAt (ISO-8601 datetime): Timestamp when the renewed period began.

  • renewalType (enum): How the renewal happened. Possible values:

    • auto-renew — automatic renewal.

    • manual-renew — the member manually re-purchased the membership through checkout.

originalRequest.description:
### GET /api/zapier-provider/renewed-members

Returns recently renewed memberships for the host resolved from the API key.

#### Request

- Method: `GET`
    
- URL: `{{host}}/api/zapier-provider/renewed-members`
    
- Query parameters:
    
    - `pageSize` (integer, required): Number of records per page.
        
    - `page` (integer, required): 1-based page number to retrieve.
        

#### Response fields

- `id` (uuid): ID of the new (active) renewal record.
    
- `membership_id` (uuid): Membership entity id.
    
- `membership_name` (string): Human-readable membership name.
    
- `membershipTier_amount` (integer): Tier price in the **smallest currency unit** (e.g. cents for USD, yen for JPY).
    
- `user_id` (uuid): Member's Sweatpals user id.
    
- `user_phone` (string | null): Member's phone number.
    
- `user_email` (string | null): Member's email.
    
- `user_fullName` (string | null): Member's display name.
    
- `renewedAt` (ISO-8601 datetime): Timestamp when the renewed period began.
    
- `renewalType` (enum): How the renewal happened. Possible values:
    
    - `auto-renew` — automatic renewal.
        
    - `manual-renew` — the member manually re-purchased the membership through checkout.

### GET /api/zapier-provider/renewed-members

Returns recently renewed memberships for the host resolved from the API key.

#### Request

- Method: `GET`
    
- URL: `{{host}}/api/zapier-provider/renewed-members`
    
- Query parameters:
    
    - `pageSize` (integer, required): Number of records per page.
        
    - `page` (integer, required): 1-based page number to retrieve.
        

#### Response fields

- `id` (uuid): ID of the new (active) renewal record.
    
- `membership_id` (uuid): Membership entity id.
    
- `membership_name` (string): Human-readable membership name.
    
- `membershipTier_amount` (integer): Tier price in the **smallest currency unit** (e.g. cents for USD, yen for JPY).
    
- `user_id` (uuid): Member's Sweatpals user id.
    
- `user_phone` (string | null): Member's phone number.
    
- `user_email` (string | null): Member's email.
    
- `user_fullName` (string | null): Member's display name.
    
- `renewedAt` (ISO-8601 datetime): Timestamp when the renewed period began.
    
- `renewalType` (enum): How the renewal happened. Possible values:
    
    - `auto-renew` — automatic renewal.
        
    - `manual-renew` — the member manually re-purchased the membership through checkout.

request.description:
GET /api/zapier-provider/orders

Returns host-scoped orders from the API key.

Money convention. All monetary fields (amount, fees, discounts, refunded amounts) are integer smallest-currency-units (e.g. cents for USD, yen for JPY). Combine with the currency field and the ISO 4217 minor-unit exponent to convert to a human-friendly value.

Request

  • Method: GET

  • URL: {{host}}/api/zapier-provider/orders

  • Query parameters:

    • pageSize (integer, required): Number of orders per page.

    • page (integer, required): 1-based page number to retrieve.

Response fields

Identity & timestamps

  • id (uuid): Sweatpals order UUID**.** Same value as sp_order_id.

  • sp_order_id (uuid): Stable primary identifier.

  • status (enum): Order lifecycle status. Possible values:

    • successful — paid and confirmed.

    • pending — checkout in progress.

    • confirmed — confirmed without payment (e.g. zero-amount or comp).

    • failed — payment failed.

    • canceled — canceled before completion.

    • pending-refund — refund initiated, awaiting Stripe.

    • refunded — fully refunded.

    • partially-refunded — partial refunded order.

  • currency (string): ISO 4217 currency code, lowercase (e.g. usd, eur, jpy).

  • created_at (ISO-8601 datetime): When the order row was first created.

  • paid_at (ISO-8601 datetime | null): When the charge was captured on Stripe. null for orders that never reached a paid state.

  • updated_at (ISO-8601 datetime): Last time any field on the order changed.

  • refund_triggered_at (ISO-8601 datetime | null): When a refund was initiated. null when no refund has been triggered.

  • dispute_status (enum | null): Current Stripe dispute lifecycle state. null when the order has no dispute. Possible values:

    • needs_response — merchant needs to respond.

    • under_review — Stripe is reviewing.

    • won — merchant won the dispute.

    • lost — merchant lost the dispute.

    • prevented — Stripe Radar prevented the dispute.

    • warning_needs_response — inquiry: merchant needs to respond.

    • warning_under_review — inquiry: Stripe is reviewing.

    • warning_closed — inquiry closed.

  • dispute_id (string | null): Stripe dispute id (e.g. dp_...), or null when no dispute.

Money (smallest currency unit, integer)

  • amount (integer | null): Total paid by the buyer.

  • calculated_amount (integer | null): Order-level amount as computed at checkout (may differ from amount after partial refunds).

  • base_amount (integer | null): Subtotal before fees, discounts, and tax.

  • tax_amount (integer | null): Sales tax collected via Stripe Tax.

  • discount_amount (integer | null): Total discount applied across all sources.

  • sp_fee (integer | null): Sweatpals platform fee.

  • stripe_fee (integer | null): Stripe processing fee.

  • full_fee (integer | null): Buyer-facing fee total (sp_fee + stripe_fee, excluding discovery commission).

  • absorbed_fee (integer | null): Fee portion absorbed by the host rather than passed to the buyer.

  • discovery_commission (integer | null): Commission deducted from host payout for discovery-originated bookings.

  • refunded_amount (integer | null): Cumulative amount refunded so far.

Stripe / payment

  • payment_intent_id (string | null): Stripe PaymentIntent id (pi_...).

  • connected_account_charge_id (string | null): Stripe charge id on the connected account.

  • stripe_connected_account_id (string | null): Connected account id (acct_...) that processed the charge.

  • stripe_customer_id (string | null): Buyer's Stripe Customer id on the platform account; null for guest checkouts.

  • dispute_fee_charge_id (string | null): Stripe charge id used to debit the host for dispute fees, when applicable.

  • dispute_transfer_reversed_at (ISO-8601 datetime | null): When the connected-account transfer was reversed due to a dispute.

Buyer (member)

  • sp_member_id (uuid | null): Buyer's Sweatpals user id; null for orders without a buyer.

  • member_email (string | null): Buyer's email.

  • member_full_name (string | null): Buyer's display name.

  • member_phone (string | null): Buyer's phone.

Product (primary line item)

  • product_type (enum | null): Primary line-item type (resolved from paymentDetails.items, with relation fallbacks for legacy orders). Possible values:

    • event_ticket — paid ticket to an Experience.

    • event_ticket_upgrade — upgrade applied to an existing ticket.

    • event_donation — donation-style ticket.

    • membership_tier — membership purchase / renewal.

    • challenge — paid challenge entry.

    • event_bundle — Experience Package (bundle of tickets).

    • blast_plan — Blast Plan subscription.

    • pos_item — custom POS line item (merchandise, walk-in, etc.).

    • bookable_service_package — appointment package.

    • unknown — fallback when type cannot be resolved.

  • product_id (string | null): Primary line-item product id (event id, membership tier id, bundle id, etc.).

  • product_name (string | null): Human-readable product name.

  • product_category (enum | null): Category group for the primary product. Possible values:

    • Experience Ticket — event_ticket

    • Experience Ticket Upgrade — event_ticket_upgrade

    • Donation Experience — event_donation

    • Membership — membership_tier

    • Challenge — challenge

    • Experience Package — event_bundle

    • Blast Plan — blast_plan

    • Merchandise (Custom POS Item) — pos_item

    • Appointment Package — bookable_service_package

    • Other — unknown

  • product_subtype (string | null): Extra qualifier — for memberships, the recurrence value (see membership_recurrence for the allowed set). null for non-membership products.

  • quantity (integer | null): Quantity of the primary line item.

  • items (array): Full pass-through of every line item on the order. Each entry contains:

    • type (enum): same value set as product_type.

    • item_id (string | null), item_name (string).

    • amount (integer): Line subtotal in the smallest currency unit.

    • discount_amount (integer): Line-level discount applied.

    • quantity (integer): Line quantity.

    • sp_fee (integer): Line share of the Sweatpals platform fee.

    • stripe_fee (integer): Line share of the Stripe processing fee.

    • tax_amount (integer | null): Line-level sales tax.

    • is_refunded (boolean): true when this line has been refunded (POS refund flow).

  • event_id (uuid | null): Event id, when the primary product is an event-related ticket / donation / upgrade.

  • event_name (string | null): Event display name, when applicable.

  • event_start_at (ISO-8601 datetime | null): Event instance start date for this order's ticket.

  • membership_tier_id (uuid | null): Membership tier id, when the primary product is a membership tier.

  • membership_tier_name (string | null): Membership tier display name.

  • membership_recurrence (enum | null): Billing recurrence for the membership tier. Possible values:

    • weekly, four-weeks, monthly, quarterly, semi-annual, annual, one-time.

Discounts

  • promo_code_discount (integer | null): Promo-code discount applied.

  • membership_discount (integer | null): Membership-driven discount applied.

  • event_bundle_discount (integer | null): Event-bundle discount applied.

  • tracking_link_discount (integer | null): Tracking / referral-link discount applied.

  • offer_discount (integer | null): Offer-based discount applied.

  • applied_discount_ids (uuid[]): Ids of all discount entities that contributed to the order. Empty array for offer-only discounts without persisted entities.

Attribution

  • booking_source (enum | null): Whether the booking originated from a Sweatpals discovery surface or a direct link. Possible values:

    • discovery — came from a Sweatpals discovery surface.

    • direct — came from a direct link.

  • discovery_surface (enum | null): Specific Sweatpals discovery surface that led to the booking (only set when booking_source = discovery). Possible values:

    • explore — explore feeds (web catalogues, mobile discovery).

    • search — search results.

    • lineup — lineup pages.

    • email — email campaigns.

    • ad — paid ads.

    • push — push notifications.

    • boost — boost placements.

    • featured — featured placements.

  • is_pos_payment (boolean): true when the order was taken via Point-of-Sale checkout (web-app POS page or mobile tap-to-pay).

response.name: Orders (OK)

originalRequest.description:
### GET /api/zapier-provider/orders

Returns host-scoped orders from the API key.

> **Money convention.** All monetary fields (`amount`, fees, discounts, refunded amounts) are integer **smallest-currency-units** (e.g. cents for USD, yen for JPY). Combine with the `currency` field and the ISO 4217 minor-unit exponent to convert to a human-friendly value. 
  

#### Request

- Method: `GET`
    
- URL: `{{host}}/api/zapier-provider/orders`
    
- Query parameters:
    
    - `pageSize` (integer, required): Number of orders per page.
        
    - `page` (integer, required): 1-based page number to retrieve.
        

#### Response fields

**Identity & timestamps**

- `id` (uuid): Sweatpals order UUID**.** Same value as `sp_order_id`.
    
- `sp_order_id` (uuid): Stable primary identifier.
    
- `status` (enum): Order lifecycle status. Possible values:
    
    - `successful` — paid and confirmed.
        
    - `pending` — checkout in progress.
        
    - `confirmed` — confirmed without payment (e.g. zero-amount or comp).
        
    - `failed` — payment failed.
        
    - `canceled` — canceled before completion.
        
    - `pending-refund` — refund initiated, awaiting Stripe.
        
    - `refunded` — fully refunded.
        
    - `partially-refunded` — partial refunded order.
        
- `currency` (string): ISO 4217 currency code, lowercase (e.g. `usd`, `eur`, `jpy`).
    
- `created_at` (ISO-8601 datetime): When the order row was first created.
    
- `paid_at` (ISO-8601 datetime | null): When the charge was captured on Stripe. `null` for orders that never reached a paid state.
    
- `updated_at` (ISO-8601 datetime): Last time any field on the order changed.
    
- `refund_triggered_at` (ISO-8601 datetime | null): When a refund was initiated. `null` when no refund has been triggered.
    
- `dispute_status` (enum | null): Current Stripe dispute lifecycle state. `null` when the order has no dispute. Possible values:
    
    - `needs_response` — merchant needs to respond.
        
    - `under_review` — Stripe is reviewing.
        
    - `won` — merchant won the dispute.
        
    - `lost` — merchant lost the dispute.
        
    - `prevented` — Stripe Radar prevented the dispute.
        
    - `warning_needs_response` — inquiry: merchant needs to respond.
        
    - `warning_under_review` — inquiry: Stripe is reviewing.
        
    - `warning_closed` — inquiry closed.
        
- `dispute_id` (string | null): Stripe dispute id (e.g. `dp_...`), or `null` when no dispute.
    

**Money (smallest currency unit, integer)**

- `amount` (integer | null): Total paid by the buyer.
    
- `calculated_amount` (integer | null): Order-level amount as computed at checkout (may differ from `amount` after partial refunds).
    
- `base_amount` (integer | null): Subtotal before fees, discounts, and tax.
    
- `tax_amount` (integer | null): Sales tax collected via Stripe Tax.
    
- `discount_amount` (integer | null): Total discount applied across all sources.
    
- `sp_fee` (integer | null): Sweatpals platform fee.
    
- `stripe_fee` (integer | null): Stripe processing fee.
    
- `full_fee` (integer | null): Buyer-facing fee total (`sp_fee + stripe_fee`, excluding discovery commission).
    
- `absorbed_fee` (integer | null): Fee portion absorbed by the host rather than passed to the buyer.
    
- `discovery_commission` (integer | null): Commission deducted from host payout for discovery-originated bookings.
    
- `refunded_amount` (integer | null): Cumulative amount refunded so far.
    

**Stripe / payment**

- `payment_intent_id` (string | null): Stripe PaymentIntent id (`pi_...`).
    
- `connected_account_charge_id` (string | null): Stripe charge id on the connected account.
    
- `stripe_connected_account_id` (string | null): Connected account id (`acct_...`) that processed the charge.
    
- `stripe_customer_id` (string | null): Buyer's Stripe Customer id on the platform account; `null` for guest checkouts.
    
- `dispute_fee_charge_id` (string | null): Stripe charge id used to debit the host for dispute fees, when applicable.
    
- `dispute_transfer_reversed_at` (ISO-8601 datetime | null): When the connected-account transfer was reversed due to a dispute.
    

**Buyer (member)**

- `sp_member_id` (uuid | null): Buyer's Sweatpals user id; `null` for orders without a buyer.
    
- `member_email` (string | null): Buyer's email.
    
- `member_full_name` (string | null): Buyer's display name.
    
- `member_phone` (string | null): Buyer's phone.
    

**Product (primary line item)**

- `product_type` (enum | null): Primary line-item type (resolved from `paymentDetails.items`, with relation fallbacks for legacy orders). Possible values:
    
    - `event_ticket` — paid ticket to an Experience.
        
    - `event_ticket_upgrade` — upgrade applied to an existing ticket.
        
    - `event_donation` — donation-style ticket.
        
    - `membership_tier` — membership purchase / renewal.
        
    - `challenge` — paid challenge entry.
        
    - `event_bundle` — Experience Package (bundle of tickets).
        
    - `blast_plan` — Blast Plan subscription.
        
    - `pos_item` — custom POS line item (merchandise, walk-in, etc.).
        
    - `bookable_service_package` — appointment package.
        
    - `unknown` — fallback when type cannot be resolved.
        
- `product_id` (string | null): Primary line-item product id (event id, membership tier id, bundle id, etc.).
    
- `product_name` (string | null): Human-readable product name.
    
- `product_category` (enum | null): Category group for the primary product. Possible values:
    
    - `Experience Ticket` — `event_ticket`
        
    - `Experience Ticket Upgrade` — `event_ticket_upgrade`
        
    - `Donation Experience` — `event_donation`
        
    - `Membership` — `membership_tier`
        
    - `Challenge` — `challenge`
        
    - `Experience Package` — `event_bundle`
        
    - `Blast Plan` — `blast_plan`
        
    - `Merchandise (Custom POS Item)` — `pos_item`
        
    - `Appointment Package` — `bookable_service_package`
        
    - `Other` — `unknown`
        
- `product_subtype` (string | null): Extra qualifier — for memberships, the recurrence value (see `membership_recurrence` for the allowed set). `null` for non-membership products.
    
- `quantity` (integer | null): Quantity of the primary line item.
    
- `items` (array): Full pass-through of every line item on the order. Each entry contains:
    
    - `type` (enum): same value set as `product_type`.
        
    - `item_id` (string | null), `item_name` (string).
        
    - `amount` (integer): Line subtotal in the smallest currency unit.
        
    - `discount_amount` (integer): Line-level discount applied.
        
    - `quantity` (integer): Line quantity.
        
    - `sp_fee` (integer): Line share of the Sweatpals platform fee.
        
    - `stripe_fee` (integer): Line share of the Stripe processing fee.
        
    - `tax_amount` (integer | null): Line-level sales tax.
        
    - `is_refunded` (boolean): `true` when this line has been refunded (POS refund flow).
        
- `event_id` (uuid | null): Event id, when the primary product is an event-related ticket / donation / upgrade.
    
- `event_name` (string | null): Event display name, when applicable.
    
- `event_start_at` (ISO-8601 datetime | null): Event instance start date for this order's ticket.
    
- `membership_tier_id` (uuid | null): Membership tier id, when the primary product is a membership tier.
    
- `membership_tier_name` (string | null): Membership tier display name.
    
- `membership_recurrence` (enum | null): Billing recurrence for the membership tier. Possible values:
    
    - `weekly`, `four-weeks`, `monthly`, `quarterly`, `semi-annual`, `annual`, `one-time`.
        

**Discounts**

- `promo_code_discount` (integer | null): Promo-code discount applied.
    
- `membership_discount` (integer | null): Membership-driven discount applied.
    
- `event_bundle_discount` (integer | null): Event-bundle discount applied.
    
- `tracking_link_discount` (integer | null): Tracking / referral-link discount applied.
    
- `offer_discount` (integer | null): Offer-based discount applied.
    
- `applied_discount_ids` (uuid\[\]): Ids of all discount entities that contributed to the order. Empty array for offer-only discounts without persisted entities.
    

**Attribution**

- `booking_source` (enum | null): Whether the booking originated from a Sweatpals discovery surface or a direct link. Possible values:
    
    - `discovery` — came from a Sweatpals discovery surface.
        
    - `direct` — came from a direct link.
        
- `discovery_surface` (enum | null): Specific Sweatpals discovery surface that led to the booking (only set when `booking_source = discovery`). Possible values:
    
    - `explore` — explore feeds (web catalogues, mobile discovery).
        
    - `search` — search results.
        
    - `lineup` — lineup pages.
        
    - `email` — email campaigns.
        
    - `ad` — paid ads.
        
    - `push` — push notifications.
        
    - `boost` — boost placements.
        
    - `featured` — featured placements.
        
- `is_pos_payment` (boolean): `true` when the order was taken via Point-of-Sale checkout (web-app POS page or mobile tap-to-pay).

originalRequest.description:
### GET /api/zapier-provider/orders

Returns host-scoped orders from the API key.

> **Money convention.** All monetary fields (`amount`, fees, discounts, refunded amounts) are integer **smallest-currency-units** (e.g. cents for USD, yen for JPY). Combine with the `currency` field and the ISO 4217 minor-unit exponent to convert to a human-friendly value. 
  

#### Request

- Method: `GET`
    
- URL: `{{host}}/api/zapier-provider/orders`
    
- Query parameters:
    
    - `pageSize` (integer, required): Number of orders per page.
        
    - `page` (integer, required): 1-based page number to retrieve.
        

#### Response fields

**Identity & timestamps**

- `id` (uuid): Sweatpals order UUID**.** Same value as `sp_order_id`.
    
- `sp_order_id` (uuid): Stable primary identifier.
    
- `status` (enum): Order lifecycle status. Possible values:
    
    - `successful` — paid and confirmed.
        
    - `pending` — checkout in progress.
        
    - `confirmed` — confirmed without payment (e.g. zero-amount or comp).
        
    - `failed` — payment failed.
        
    - `canceled` — canceled before completion.
        
    - `pending-refund` — refund initiated, awaiting Stripe.
        
    - `refunded` — fully refunded.
        
    - `partially-refunded` — partial refunded order.
        
- `currency` (string): ISO 4217 currency code, lowercase (e.g. `usd`, `eur`, `jpy`).
    
- `created_at` (ISO-8601 datetime): When the order row was first created.
    
- `paid_at` (ISO-8601 datetime | null): When the charge was captured on Stripe. `null` for orders that never reached a paid state.
    
- `updated_at` (ISO-8601 datetime): Last time any field on the order changed.
    
- `refund_triggered_at` (ISO-8601 datetime | null): When a refund was initiated. `null` when no refund has been triggered.
    
- `dispute_status` (enum | null): Current Stripe dispute lifecycle state. `null` when the order has no dispute. Possible values:
    
    - `needs_response` — merchant needs to respond.
        
    - `under_review` — Stripe is reviewing.
        
    - `won` — merchant won the dispute.
        
    - `lost` — merchant lost the dispute.
        
    - `prevented` — Stripe Radar prevented the dispute.
        
    - `warning_needs_response` — inquiry: merchant needs to respond.
        
    - `warning_under_review` — inquiry: Stripe is reviewing.
        
    - `warning_closed` — inquiry closed.
        
- `dispute_id` (string | null): Stripe dispute id (e.g. `dp_...`), or `null` when no dispute.
    

**Money (smallest currency unit, integer)**

- `amount` (integer | null): Total paid by the buyer.
    
- `calculated_amount` (integer | null): Order-level amount as computed at checkout (may differ from `amount` after partial refunds).
    
- `base_amount` (integer | null): Subtotal before fees, discounts, and tax.
    
- `tax_amount` (integer | null): Sales tax collected via Stripe Tax.
    
- `discount_amount` (integer | null): Total discount applied across all sources.
    
- `sp_fee` (integer | null): Sweatpals platform fee.
    
- `stripe_fee` (integer | null): Stripe processing fee.
    
- `full_fee` (integer | null): Buyer-facing fee total (`sp_fee + stripe_fee`, excluding discovery commission).
    
- `absorbed_fee` (integer | null): Fee portion absorbed by the host rather than passed to the buyer.
    
- `discovery_commission` (integer | null): Commission deducted from host payout for discovery-originated bookings.
    
- `refunded_amount` (integer | null): Cumulative amount refunded so far.
    

**Stripe / payment**

- `payment_intent_id` (string | null): Stripe PaymentIntent id (`pi_...`).
    
- `connected_account_charge_id` (string | null): Stripe charge id on the connected account.
    
- `stripe_connected_account_id` (string | null): Connected account id (`acct_...`) that processed the charge.
    
- `stripe_customer_id` (string | null): Buyer's Stripe Customer id on the platform account; `null` for guest checkouts.
    
- `dispute_fee_charge_id` (string | null): Stripe charge id used to debit the host for dispute fees, when applicable.
    
- `dispute_transfer_reversed_at` (ISO-8601 datetime | null): When the connected-account transfer was reversed due to a dispute.
    

**Buyer (member)**

- `sp_member_id` (uuid | null): Buyer's Sweatpals user id; `null` for orders without a buyer.
    
- `member_email` (string | null): Buyer's email.
    
- `member_full_name` (string | null): Buyer's display name.
    
- `member_phone` (string | null): Buyer's phone.
    

**Product (primary line item)**

- `product_type` (enum | null): Primary line-item type (resolved from `paymentDetails.items`, with relation fallbacks for legacy orders). Possible values:
    
    - `event_ticket` — paid ticket to an Experience.
        
    - `event_ticket_upgrade` — upgrade applied to an existing ticket.
        
    - `event_donation` — donation-style ticket.
        
    - `membership_tier` — membership purchase / renewal.
        
    - `challenge` — paid challenge entry.
        
    - `event_bundle` — Experience Package (bundle of tickets).
        
    - `blast_plan` — Blast Plan subscription.
        
    - `pos_item` — custom POS line item (merchandise, walk-in, etc.).
        
    - `bookable_service_package` — appointment package.
        
    - `unknown` — fallback when type cannot be resolved.
        
- `product_id` (string | null): Primary line-item product id (event id, membership tier id, bundle id, etc.).
    
- `product_name` (string | null): Human-readable product name.
    
- `product_category` (enum | null): Category group for the primary product. Possible values:
    
    - `Experience Ticket` — `event_ticket`
        
    - `Experience Ticket Upgrade` — `event_ticket_upgrade`
        
    - `Donation Experience` — `event_donation`
        
    - `Membership` — `membership_tier`
        
    - `Challenge` — `challenge`
        
    - `Experience Package` — `event_bundle`
        
    - `Blast Plan` — `blast_plan`
        
    - `Merchandise (Custom POS Item)` — `pos_item`
        
    - `Appointment Package` — `bookable_service_package`
        
    - `Other` — `unknown`
        
- `product_subtype` (string | null): Extra qualifier — for memberships, the recurrence value (see `membership_recurrence` for the allowed set). `null` for non-membership products.
    
- `quantity` (integer | null): Quantity of the primary line item.
    
- `items` (array): Full pass-through of every line item on the order. Each entry contains:
    
    - `type` (enum): same value set as `product_type`.
        
    - `item_id` (string | null), `item_name` (string).
        
    - `amount` (integer): Line subtotal in the smallest currency unit.
        
    - `discount_amount` (integer): Line-level discount applied.
        
    - `quantity` (integer): Line quantity.
        
    - `sp_fee` (integer): Line share of the Sweatpals platform fee.
        
    - `stripe_fee` (integer): Line share of the Stripe processing fee.
        
    - `tax_amount` (integer | null): Line-level sales tax.
        
    - `is_refunded` (boolean): `true` when this line has been refunded (POS refund flow).
        
- `event_id` (uuid | null): Event id, when the primary product is an event-related ticket / donation / upgrade.
    
- `event_name` (string | null): Event display name, when applicable.
    
- `event_start_at` (ISO-8601 datetime | null): Event instance start date for this order's ticket.
    
- `membership_tier_id` (uuid | null): Membership tier id, when the primary product is a membership tier.
    
- `membership_tier_name` (string | null): Membership tier display name.
    
- `membership_recurrence` (enum | null): Billing recurrence for the membership tier. Possible values:
    
    - `weekly`, `four-weeks`, `monthly`, `quarterly`, `semi-annual`, `annual`, `one-time`.
        

**Discounts**

- `promo_code_discount` (integer | null): Promo-code discount applied.
    
- `membership_discount` (integer | null): Membership-driven discount applied.
    
- `event_bundle_discount` (integer | null): Event-bundle discount applied.
    
- `tracking_link_discount` (integer | null): Tracking / referral-link discount applied.
    
- `offer_discount` (integer | null): Offer-based discount applied.
    
- `applied_discount_ids` (uuid\[\]): Ids of all discount entities that contributed to the order. Empty array for offer-only discounts without persisted entities.
    

**Attribution**

- `booking_source` (enum | null): Whether the booking originated from a Sweatpals discovery surface or a direct link. Possible values:
    
    - `discovery` — came from a Sweatpals discovery surface.
        
    - `direct` — came from a direct link.
        
- `discovery_surface` (enum | null): Specific Sweatpals discovery surface that led to the booking (only set when `booking_source = discovery`). Possible values:
    
    - `explore` — explore feeds (web catalogues, mobile discovery).
        
    - `search` — search results.
        
    - `lineup` — lineup pages.
        
    - `email` — email campaigns.
        
    - `ad` — paid ads.
        
    - `push` — push notifications.
        
    - `boost` — boost placements.
        
    - `featured` — featured placements.
        
- `is_pos_payment` (boolean): `true` when the order was taken via Point-of-Sale checkout (web-app POS page or mobile tap-to-pay).

request.description:
Request

This endpoint retrieves payment details for a ticket based on its ID or short ID.

Path parameter:

  • id (string): The ID or short ID of the ticket.

Response

The response will include the payment details for the specified ticket in the following JSON schema:

{
  "id": {"type": "string"},
  "shortId": {"type": "string"},
  "orderId": {"type": "string"},
  "eventPriceId": {"type": "string"},
  "isTicketUsed": {"type": "boolean"},
  "userId": {"type": "string"},
  "signedAt": {"type": ["string", "null"]},
  "isUsedByUserId": {"type": ["string", "null"]},
  "isCanceled": {"type": "boolean"},
  "intakeFormResults": {
    "reserved_email": {"type": "string"},
    "reserved_phone": {"type": "string"},
    "skipSigningForm": {"type": "boolean"},
    "reserved_fullname": {"type": "string"}
  },
  "fullName": {"type": "string"},
  "email": {"type": "string"},
  "usedAt": {"type": ["string", "null"]},
  "discountId": {"type": ["string", "null"]},
  "createdAt": {"type": "string"},
  "updatedAt": {"type": "string"},
  "deletedAt": {"type": ["string", "null"]}
}

response.name: Get Ticket
